videos.headline: Shedeur Sanders hits the Deion Shuffle after TD run
videos.description: Shedeur Sanders takes it himself for the score and hits the Deion Shuffle as Colorado pads its lead to 36-7.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Shedeur Sanders hits the Deion Shuffle after TD run) 2023/9/9 ESHEET

videos.headline: Shedeur Sanders shines with 3 TDs in Colorado's victory vs. Nebraska
videos.description: Shedeur Sanders throws 2 touchdowns and runs for another score as Colorado cruises to a 36-14 victory vs. Nebraska.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Shedeur Sanders shines with 3 TDs in Colorado's victory vs. Nebraska) 2023/9/9 ESHEET Sotfull

videos.headline: Colorado forces big interception, celebrates on turnover throne
videos.description: Cam'Ron Silmon-Craig snags the interception as Colorado takes over with good field position.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Colorado forces big interception, celebrates on turnover throne) 2023/9/9 ESHEET

videos.headline: Shedeur Sanders connects with Tar'Varish Dawson for a Colorado TD
videos.description: Shedeur Sanders finds an open Tar'Varish Dawson for the score as Colorado pads their lead to 10-0.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Shedeur Sanders connects with Tar'Varish Dawson for a Colorado TD) 2023/9/9 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jeff Sims takes it 57 yards for a Nebraska TD
videos.description: Jeff Sims takes it 57 yards to the house on a quarterback draw as Nebraska cuts it to 13-7 vs. Colorado.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jeff Sims takes it 57 yards for a Nebraska TD) 2023/9/9 ESHEET

videos.headline: Xavier Weaver hauls in a TD for Colorado
videos.description: Shedeur Sanders finds Xavier Weaver for the score as Colorado extends its lead to 20-7.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Xavier Weaver hauls in a TD for Colorado) 2023/9/9 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tar'Varish Dawson takes it in for a Colorado TD
videos.description: Tar'Varish Dawson takes it in on the reverse as Colorado increases its lead to 29-7 vs. Nebraska.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tar'Varish Dawson takes it in for a Colorado TD) 2023/9/9 ESHEET

videos.headline: Colorado fans rush Folsom Field after taking down Nebraska
videos.description: Colorado fans rush Folsom Field after defeating Nebraska 36-14 and collecting their second win.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Colorado fans rush Folsom Field after taking down Nebraska) 2023/9/9 ESHEET

videos.headline: Shedeur Sanders explains why he doesn't respect Matt Rhule and Nebraska
videos.description: Shedeur Sanders talks about his lack of respect for Matt Rhule and Nebraska after Rhule's comments about Deion Sanders in the offseason.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Presser (Shedeur Sanders explains why he doesn't respect Matt Rhule and Nebraska) 2023/09/09
